_meta.name: CLM 1B r4 Corpus Expansion Plan (Chinchilla-proper)
_meta.author: corpus planning session
_meta.goal: Expand corpus from 1.3GB to 3-6GB for eval <= 1.0

baseline.chinchilla_ratio_note: tokens_trained / (20 * params) = 40.96M / 30.2B = 0.0014. Corpus_size / (20 * params) = 1.395B / 30.2B = 0.046. Both severely undertrained.

chinchilla_analysis.note: Full Chinchilla is 28GB corpus — impractical for current infra. Target 3-6GB as practical compromise.
chinchilla_analysis.expected_improvement: 2-4x more data coverage per step. With longer training (more steps), expect eval 1.23 -> sub-1.0

content_types: Consciousness law texts (IIT, Phi, GWT concepts)
Mixed UTF-8 text + raw binary byte sequences
current_corpus_composition.note: Byte-level model benefits from diverse byte distributions including binary data

corpus_v11_multilingual.txt.note: Likely superset of split files — verify dedup before using

C_instruct_data.note: Would need text extraction from JSON fields. Good for instruction-following capability.

shared_consciousness.note: 1033 laws, mechanisms, seeds — tiny but domain-specific

shared_discovery.note: Discovery graphs, reality maps, math atlas — structured JSON

D_consciousness_domain_data.note: Unique domain data not in any public corpus. Could improve consciousness-specific generation but small relative to target.

E_external_needed.note: With local data already at 9.76GB, NO external data is needed to reach 3-6GB target. The ready/ submodule has sufficient coverage.

recommended_plan.strategy: Use multilingual splits from ready/anima/data/corpus_multilingual/ as primary source

en_txt_sample.note: Sample 50% of en.txt (3GB -> 1.5GB) — shuffle-sample for diversity

code_txt_sample.note: Sample 25% of code.txt — structural reasoning skills

recommended_plan.dedup_note: Must deduplicate current corpus against ko.txt and en.txt since corpus_clm_combined.txt may contain overlapping content from earlier versions
recommended_plan.output_note: New file, do not overwrite corpus_clm_combined.txt (r3f reproducibility)

option_A_practical.name: Practical (cost-bounded)
option_A_practical.note: 2.5x more steps than r3f but still << 1 epoch. May not reach eval 1.0.

option_B_recommended.name: Recommended (1 epoch over 5GB)
option_B_recommended.note: Covers ~61% of corpus. Strong improvement expected. ~1.7 days.

option_C_chinchilla.name: Chinchilla-approach (2 epochs over 5GB)
option_C_chinchilla.note: Covers corpus 1.2x. Best chance to reach eval <= 1.0. ~3.4 days.

corpus_build_steps: 9. Upload to pod: rclone copy training/corpus_clm_r4.txt.gz runpod:/workspace/anima/training/

risks.mitigation: Run dd preflight test before training. rm -rf old ckpts.
Check fingerprints of first 10K lines between sources.
Pod has 50GB disk. 5GB corpus + 3GB model + 12GB optimizer = 20GB. Plenty of headroom.
Use tmux + nohup. save_every=5000 for R2 recovery points.
Option C (1.5M steps) as fallback. Or increase batch_size to 32 (more VRAM available).

success_criteria.phi_holo: >= 1.2× step_0 baseline (CLM-P4-2 ratio gate, N-independent; absolute >=500 deprecated 2026-04-20 — raw MI × N masks random-init pass). Secondary: mi_per_element = phi_holo / (seq × d_model) > 0.05 nats.
